Dhaka hopes India will come forward understanding importance of Ganges Water Treaty
results.description: Bangladesh expects positive progress on renewing the Ganges Water Treaty as officials and experts stress the need for a modern, climate-resilient agreement before the current pact expires in December.

results.title: US and Iran exchange intensifying fire across the Gulf, threatening the interim deal to end war
results.description: The United States has launched new airstrikes against Iran, and Tehran responded by targeting Gulf countries. The exchange of fire threatened an interim deal intended to help end the war in the Middle East. Back-and-forth attacks have repeatedly threatened the...

results.title: Theatre campaigners accuse Waterford council of squandering ‘once-in-a-lifetime’ opportunity
results.description: A group in Tramore, Co Waterford who are campaigning for a theatre to be provided in the seaside town has expressed its “deep disappointment” at what it called the local authority’s ‘missed opportunity’ to deliver the facility.
